provenance: Gaming-specific bonus priors layered on the base structural viralScore. DESIGN PARAMETERS, not dataset statistics.

detectability.note: Kills, clutches and victories are INFERRED from audio/scene/motion surprise proxies — not from kill-feed OCR, game telemetry, or a trained vision model. Each is treated as a candidate with a measured confidence. Do not present these as ground-truth game events.

kill.note: Sharp transient clusters; multi-kill = multiple within a short window.

clutch.note: Long high-motion stretch resolving in a late audio/scene spike (1vX / low-health / last-second proxy).

reaction.note: Requires a detected facecam region to attribute reaction; otherwise low confidence.

victory.note: Win-screen / match-victory proxy near the clip end.

formula: gamingViralScore = clamp01( viralScore + killBonus + clutchBonus + reactionBonus + victoryBonus )
